mapper.select: select (select count(*) from questions) as questionCount, (select count(*) from competitions) as competitionCount, (select count(*) from competitions where status = 'active') as activeCompetitionCount, (select count(*) from users where role = 'user') as userCount, (select count(*) from competition_participants) as participantCount, (select count(*) from submissions) as submissionCount, (select count(*) from messages) as messageCount, (select count(*) from users where role = 'user' and (nicknameStatus = 'pending' or avatarStatus = 'pending')) as pendingReviewCount

select * from ( select 1 as sortOrder, 'questions' as tableName, '题库数据' as displayName, count(*) as recordCount, '保存赛题标题、题干、选项、答案、分类与分值。' as description, '/quiz/question' as routePath, '进入题目管理' as routeLabel from questions union all select 2 as sortOrder, 'competitions' as tableName, '竞赛数据' as displayName, count(*) as recordCount, '保存竞赛时间、状态、总分与赛题编排信息。' as description, '/quiz/competition' as routePath, '进入竞赛管理' as routeLabel from competitions union all select 3 as sortOrder, 'competition_questions' as tableName, '竞赛题目关系' as displayName, count(*) as recordCount, '记录每场竞赛与题目的关联顺序。' as description, '/quiz/competition' as routePath, '查看竞赛编排' as routeLabel from competition_questions union all select 4 as sortOrder, 'competition_participants' as tableName, '参赛成绩数据' as displayName, count(*) as recordCount, '保存用户参赛得分与完赛状态。' as description, '/quiz/leaderboard' as routePath, '查看排行榜' as routeLabel from competition_participants union all select 5 as sortOrder, 'submissions' as tableName, '答题提交记录' as displayName, count(*) as recordCount, '记录每次答题提交与判题结果。' as description, '/quiz/leaderboard' as routePath, '查看数据表现' as routeLabel from submissions union all select 6 as sortOrder, 'users' as tableName, '业务用户数据' as displayName, count(*) as recordCount, '保存参赛用户账号、昵称、头像与积分。' as description, '/quiz/user' as routePath, '进入业务用户' as routeLabel from users union all select 7 as sortOrder, 'messages' as tableName, '站内消息数据' as displayName, count(*) as recordCount, '保存审核通知和业务侧消息提醒。' as description, '/quiz/nickname-audit' as routePath, '查看审核流程' as routeLabel from messages ) stats order by sortOrder asc

select c.id, c.title, c.status, c.startDate, c.endDate, c.totalPoints, c.createdAt as createTime, count(distinct cq.questionId) as questionCount, count(distinct cp.userId) as participantCount from competitions c left join competition_questions cq on cq.competitionId = c.id left join competition_participants cp on cp.competitionId = c.id group by c.id, c.title, c.status, c.startDate, c.endDate, c.totalPoints, c.createdAt order by c.createdAt desc, c.id desc limit 6

select * from ( select u.id, u.username, u.nickname, u.score, 'nickname' as reviewType, u.nicknameStatus as reviewStatus, u.createdAt as createTime from users u where u.role = 'user' and u.nicknameStatus = 'pending' union all select u.id, u.username, u.nickname, u.score, 'avatar' as reviewType, u.avatarStatus as reviewStatus, u.createdAt as createTime from users u where u.role = 'user' and u.avatarStatus = 'pending' ) reviews order by createTime desc, id desc limit 8
select u.id as userId, u.username, u.nickname, u.nicknameStatus, u.avatar, u.avatarStatus, u.score from users u where u.role = 'user' order by u.score desc, u.createdAt asc, u.id asc limit 8
